description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a qa stage that runs on the ruby:2.6-alpine Docker image and sets GIT_DEPTH to '1'. Add a package-and-qa job that extends the base, runs the script lines `source scripts/utils.sh`, `install_gitlab_gem`, `./scripts/trigger-build omnibus`, is allowed to fail, runs on any branch except master, needs the build-qa-image and gitlab:assets:compile pull-cache jobs, and only runs when CI_SERVER_HOST is gitlab.com and CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE is gitlab-org. Add a package-and-qa-manual job that also extends the base, runs the same three script commands, is manual, excludes the master branch, needs build-qa-image and gitlab:assets:compile pull-cache, and follows the same variable condition. Add a package-and-qa-manual:master job that extends the base, runs the same script, is manual, runs only on the master branch of the gitlab-org/gitlab-foss or gitlab-org/gitlab projects, needs build-qa-image and gitlab:assets:compile, and respects the same CI_SERVER_HOST and CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE condition.
